overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from GTA V depicting a nighttime walk along the rain-soaked Del Perro Pier. The player moves past glowing street lamps and neon signs toward the main pier buildings, with the Los Santos city skyline visible in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: open wooden pier with city skyline view

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wet wooden pier planks toward the distant city lights

entered.detail: wet wooden planks reflecting the yellow street lamps
tall lamp posts casting warm yellow light and visible rain streaks
metal railing along the edge of the pier overlooking water
distant illuminated skyscrapers across the water
bright green and white neon sign visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a rain-soaked wooden pier at night, with the camera moving forward along the planks. Yellow street lamps illuminate the wet surface, creating reflections, while the distant city skyline glows on the horizon. The open waterfront area is sparsely populated with scattered pedestrians.

scene_state.functional_zone: pier approach with benches and railings

events.description: turning left toward the pier end buildings, away from the open water view

agents.ego_description: continuing along the pier as the main building complex comes into view ahead

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in dark clothing walking ahead toward the buildings

entered.detail: white concrete bench with wooden slats facing the water
red emergency call box mounted on a pole
large multi-story building at the end of the pier with illuminated windows

segments.scene_description: The camera turns toward the pier end, revealing white benches and emergency boxes along the railing. The main pier building becomes visible in the distance, while the city skyline shifts to the left side of the frame. The walkway remains open and exposed to the light rain.

scene_state.functional_zone: pier plaza with seafood restaurant and food vendors

events.description: passing the yellow hot dog cart on the left side of the walkway

agents.ego_description: walking through the main pier plaza area toward the restaurant entrance

notable_agents.action: vendor standing near the hot dog cart with yellow umbrella

entered.detail: yellow food cart with red and yellow umbrella
blue neon sign for Pearls seafood restaurant on the building
small wooden ticket booth or information stand
large potted plants near the building entrance

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into the main pier plaza where the large seafood restaurant building dominates the right side. A yellow hot dog cart stands on the left as the camera approaches the entrance. The area is moderately populated with pedestrians, and neon signs illuminate the building facade.

events.description: entering the darker covered area beneath the building overhang
passing close by the cafe menu board on the left

agents.ego_description: walking under the building overhang and following NPCs ahead into the covered walkway

notable_agents.action: two women in swimsuits walking ahead into the covered area
person sitting at outdoor table near the building

entered.detail: standing menu board displaying coffee and drink options with images
covered roof structure extending over the walkway
wooden tables and chairs outside the cafe

segments.scene_description: The camera moves under the building's overhang into a darker, sheltered walkway. The lighting shifts to low artificial light as the camera passes a cafe menu board and outdoor seating. Two women in swimsuits walk ahead into the covered area, which provides shelter from the rain.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement along a rain-soaked pier at night, transitioning from an open, exposed waterfront into a sheltered urban plaza. It begins by gliding over wet wooden planks illuminated by yellow street lamps, with the glowing city skyline visible on the distant horizon. As the camera turns toward the end of the pier, the view shifts past white benches and emergency boxes toward the looming silhouette of the main pier building. The scene then opens into a bustling plaza where neon signs light up a large seafood restaurant and a yellow hot dog cart before the camera moves under a building overhang. Finally, the environment shifts from the open rain to a darker, sheltered walkway, passing a cafe menu and outdoor seating as pedestrians move deeper into the covered area.
